auth.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Please sign in again.

hero.title: We use A.I to reduce your factory's energy costs.
hero.subtitle: CEI ingests your meter and SCADA data, builds statistical baselines for each site, and turns night, weekend, and process inefficiencies into actionable alerts and reports — without installing new hardware.

invite.notice: You're joining an organization via invite. Create your account to continue.
invite.badgeBody: You'll join an existing organization after account creation.

fullName.label: Full name (optional)
fullName.help: This is stored on your profile and used in audit logs.

organizationName.label: Organization name
organizationName.help: This creates your org. Use an invite link to join an existing org.

password.label: Password
password.help: Minimum 8 characters. Use a strong password.

errors.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.inviteJoinNotLive: Invite join isn't live on this backend yet. Deploy the invites router, then retry.
errors.inviteMissingAccessToken: Invite signup succeeded but response missing access_token.

chooseType.title: Create your account
chooseType.subtitle: How will you be using CEI?

manager.title: Energy manager / consultant
manager.description: I manage energy for multiple client organizations (ESCO, energy auditor, consultant).

organization.title: Organization
organization.description: I represent a factory, facility, or company and want to monitor my own energy.

inviteeOrg.title: Invited to an organization
inviteeOrg.description: I received an invite link from my organization to join their energy platform.

inviteeConsultant.title: Invited to a consultant firm
inviteeConsultant.description: I received an invite link from an energy consultant or ESCO to join their team.

selfSignup.managerSubtitle: Your account will be set up as an energy management firm. You can add client organizations from the Manage dashboard.
selfSignup.orgSubtitle: Your account will be set up as a standalone organization with full access to sites, alerts, and reports.

invitee.consultantSubtitle: Paste the invite token sent by your energy management firm. You'll be added as a team member.
invitee.orgSubtitle: Paste the invite token sent by your organization. You'll be added with the role assigned by your admin.
invitee.tokenAutoFilled: Token auto-filled from your invite link.
invitee.invalidToken: Invalid invite token. It should start with 'cei_inv_'. Check the link you received.
invitee.errorGeneric: Failed to accept invite. Please check your details and try again.

header.title: Portfolio management
header.subtitle: Overview of all client organizations, ingestion health, and alert status.

clients.title: Client organizations
clients.noClients: No client organizations yet. Use POST /manage/onboarding/bootstrap to add your first client.

sites.title: Sites
sites.noSites: No sites yet. Add one to start ingesting data.
sites.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}? This will remove the site and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

tokens.title: Integration tokens
tokens.newTokenBanner: Token created — copy it now, it won't be shown again
tokens.revokeConfirm: Revoke {{name}}? Any system using this token will lose access immediately.
tokens.createHint: The raw token will be shown once after creation. Store it securely — it cannot be retrieved again.

users.title: Users
users.noUsers: No users in this org yet. Invite someone to get started.
users.inviteBanner: Invite created for {{email}} — share this token with them

thresholds.title: Alert thresholds
thresholds.customActive: Custom thresholds are active for this org.
thresholds.usingDefaults: Using system defaults. Edit and save to set custom thresholds.

minKwh.label: Min total kWh
minKwh.hint: Minimum energy for alert to fire

header.title: Portfolio overview
header.subtitle: High-level energy view across all sites over the last 24 hours. Use this as your daily cockpit: is the fleet behaving as expected?

energy.title: Energy — last 24 hours (all sites)
energy.noData: No recent timeseries data yet. Upload a CSV or connect a source to light this up.

coverage.title: Data coverage (points)
coverage.body: Total number of readings in the selected window.

fleetStatus.title: Fleet status
fleetStatus.body: Simple heuristic based on whether any readings exist in the last 24 hours.

ingest.title: Ingest health (last 24h)
ingest.noMetersBody: No meters returned. Once data is ingested, this will show coverage by meter.

trend.title: Portfolio energy trend — last 24 hours
trend.subtitle: Hourly energy profile across all sites combined.
trend.noData: No recent series data. After you ingest CSV data or connect a live feed, CEI will chart the last 24 hours here.
trend.summary: Peak hour: {{peakLabel}} at {{maxVal}} kWh · Average: {{avgVal}} kWh/h over {{windowHours}} hours · Min hourly: {{minVal}} kWh/h.

focus.title: What to pay attention to today
focus.subtitle: A lightweight, qualitative layer on top of the raw charts.
focus.item1: Check whether the overnight baseline looks flat and low. A rising baseline over time usually hides idle losses.
focus.item2: Compare this 24-hour profile with a known "good" day. Look for new peaks or extended high-load zones.

item3.suffix: page to see which sites are driving any abnormal consumption.
